text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, driven by rising Treasury yields and surging oil prices due to geopolitical tensions. These factors create headwinds for growth stocks, especially your concentrated tech and chip names.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.02%) and SPAL (-34%) are leveraged ETFs suffering significant drawdowns. SPAL has breached its stop, demanding immediate attention. QQQI (-1.77%) is also close to its trim stop. Margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on Treasury yields, as their direction heavily influences tech valuations. Also, monitor geopolitical developments impacting oil prices and broader market sentiment.

Bottom line: Focus on risk management for your leveraged positions, as macro headwinds are building against your concentrated book.
plays: SPAL: The stop at 21.38 has been breached (current price 16.6). Consider cutting this leveraged position to prevent further losses.
SOXL: Down -35.02% on a leveraged ETF. Re-evaluate your stop (currently 200, which is above current price) and consider reducing exposure to manage risk.
QQQI: With a "TRIM" status and -1.77% loss, consider trimming if it approaches its 52 stop.
